message:
fix: stream forward/peekable enhancements, mpsc lost-wakeup test, timeout and transport improvements

stream/forward: expanded forwarding capabilities (buffering, error
handling, completion semantics).

stream/peekable: enhanced peek implementation.

channel/mpsc: added lost_wakeup_test that verifies when a queued reserve
(A) is granted and then dropped without polling, the next waiter (B)
receives a wakeup. This covers a subtle edge case where dropping A
without consuming the grant must propagate the wakeup to B.

time/timeout_future: additional timeout configuration and behavior
refinements.

transport/stream: expanded SymbolStream capabilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
